description: Consent, authorization grant, delegation, revocation, and purpose-bound access lifecycle plugin. Generic — no product-specific consent semantics built in.

defaultExpiryDays.description: Default consent validity period in days. Products override per-purpose via binding manifest. Defaults to 730 (2 years).

revocationPropagationEnabled.description: Whether consent revocation events are propagated to registered subscribers. Defaults to true.

purposeExpiryOverrides.description: JSON map of purpose-name to expiry-days overrides, e.g. '{"marketing": 365}'.
